text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright chose to improve at her own pace,
but she still has a very long way to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrange for her to partner run with her
classmate, Seeking the Pearl, but she ultimately
loses. Our days of endless training continue...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Until one day, everything changes. Mejiro Bright
suddenly runs in a way I've never seen from her
before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It turns out, she's experiencing pain in her legs
due to her growth. Deciding not to push herself
until the pain subsides, she waits until it's gone to
spread her wings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's able to make a full recovery because of
that. I now understand why she's been intent on
taking her time.
